igbo.base_10_blocks_ones_tens_hundreds_thou: Base-10 Blocks — otu, iri, narị, puku
igbo.the_whole_point_of_place_value_made_ta: Ebumnuche niile nke place value emere ka ọ bụrụ ihe A NA-EMETỤ AKA. Otu 10 = iri 1; iri 10 = narị 1; narị 10 = puku 1. Regrouping (carrying / borrowing) na-apụta ìhè mgbe ị ga-eji aka gbanwee blocks.
igbo.soroban_japanese_and_suanpan_chinese_a: A ka na-akụzi Soroban (nke Japan) na Suanpan (nke China) — ndị ọkachamara na-emeri calculators n'ọsọ n'ọtụtụ nsogbu. Rod ọ bụla bụ place value; ọnọdụ beads BỤ ọnụọgụgụ. Site n'ihe a na-emetụ aka ruo n'isi n'ime ọnwa ole na ole.
igbo.how_engineers_multiplied_before_electr: Otú ndị injinia si abawanye tupu calculators eletrọnik: hazie logarithmic scales, gụọ azịza ya. Apollo 11 (1969) ji slide rules mee mgbakọ orbit. E jiri ihe ọzọ dochie ha naanị mgbe HP-35 pụtara na 1972.
igbo.quiz_graded_place_value_arithmetic: Quiz — place value na arithmetic nwere akara
igbo.ccss_1_nbt_2_nbt_3_nbt_4_nbt_progressi: Usoro CCSS 1.NBT, 2.NBT, 3.NBT, 4.NBT. Usoro concrete-pictorial-abstract (CPA, Bruner 1966) bụ ọkpụkpụ azụ nke curriculum mgbakọ ọ bụla e mere nke ọma nke ụlọ akwụkwọ praịmarị.
igbo.ten_frames_the_k_2_number_sense_workho: Ten Frames — isi ihe nke number sense nke K-2
igbo.a_5_by_2_grid_fill_cells_to_show_a_num: Grid nke 5 na 2. Mejupụta cells iji gosi ọnụọgụgụ. Subitizing (ịmata ozugbo na-agụghị ọnụ) na-eto ebe a. CCSS K.OA.A.4: ajụjụ "gịnị na-eme 10?" bụ ọnụ ụzọ nke fluency arithmetic niile na-esote.
igbo.two_color_counters_integers_concrete: Two-Color Counters — integers dị ka ihe a na-emetụ aka
igbo.yellow_1_red_1_a_yellow_red_pair_0_a_z: Odo = +1; uhie = -1. Ụzọ odo + uhie = 0 ("zero pair"). Model kacha doo anya maka ịghọta negative numbers na integer arithmetic. CCSS 6.NS.C.5, 7.NS.A.1.
igbo.place_value_disks_bridge_to_algorithm: Place-Value Disks — àkwà mmiri gaa na algorithm
igbo.each_disk_labeled_with_its_value_1_10_: E depụtara uru nke disk ọ bụla (1, 10, 100, 1000). Kpụga disks 10 nke otu ụdị ka ị gbanwee ya maka 1 nke uru na-esote. Àkwà mmiri echiche site na blocks anụ ahụ ruo standard algorithm. CCSS 4.NBT.B.4.
igbo.hundreds_chart_count_pattern_and_skip: Hundreds Chart — gụọ, pattern, na wụfe
igbo.a_10x10_grid_of_1_100_click_to_highlig: Grid 10x10 nke 1-100. Pịa iji mee ka cells nwuo. Skip-count overlays na-ekpughe patterns nke ịba ụba. CCSS 2.NBT.A.2: skip-counting site na 5, 10, 100.
igbo.hexagon_trapezoid_rhombus_triangle_squ: Hexagon, trapezoid, rhombus, triangle, square, rhombus dị warara. Trapezoids 6 = hexagon 1 (ya mere trapezoid 1 = 1/2 nke hexagon). Rhombi 3 = hexagon 1 (ya mere rhombus 1 = 1/3). Triangles 6 = hexagon 1 (ya mere triangle 1 = 1/6).
igbo.geoboard_polygons_on_a_peg_grid: Geoboard — polygons na grid nke pegs
igbo.connect_pegs_with_rubber_bands_to_make: Jikọọ pegs na "rubber bands" iji mee polygons. Tụọ perimeter na area. Ngwaọrụ ọdịnala a na-emetụ aka maka plane geometry na Pick's theorem.
igbo.belgian_teacher_georges_cuisenaire_195: Onye nkuzi Belgium Georges Cuisenaire (1952): rods 10, ogologo 1-10, nke ọ bụla nwere agba dị iche. Tinye rods iji mee ọnụọgụgụ ọhụrụ. Ọcha=1, uhie=2, akwụkwọ ndụ dị mfe=3, odo odo=4, odo=5, akwụkwọ ndụ gbara ọchịchịrị=6, oji=7, aja aja=8, anụnụ=9, oroma=10.
igbo.the_whole_splits_into_two_parts_singap: Ihe zuru oke na-ekewa ụzọ abụọ. Singapore Math mere ka nke a bụrụ isi. CCSS K.OA.A.3: kewaa 10 ka ọ bụrụ ụzọ abụọ abụọ. Nke a na-ewuli ụzọ gaa na mgbakọ na mwepụ niile.
igbo.fraction_bars_compare_and_add_fraction: Fraction Bars — tụnyere ma tinye fractions
igbo.equal_length_bars_partitioned_into_hal: Bars nwere otu ogologo nke e kewara ka ọ bụrụ ọkara, ụzọ atọ, ụzọ anọ, ụzọ isii, ụzọ asatọ, na ụzọ iri na abụọ. Tụkwasa ha iji tụnyere. Chọta ndị hà nhata site n'anya. Ngwaọrụ kachasị dị mma maka fraction equivalence (3.NF, 4.NF).
igbo.algebra_tiles_model_expressions_and_eq: Algebra Tiles — mee model nke expressions na equations
igbo.a_tile_for_1_unit_x_variable_x_square_: Tile maka 1 (unit), x (variable), x² (square). Agba abụọ: positive na negative. Mee model nke expressions dị ka 2x + 3 ma ọ bụ factor quadratics site n'ịhazi tiles ka ọ bụrụ rectangles. CCSS 7.EE, 8.EE.
igbo.bruner_1966_students_master_each_conce: Bruner (1966): ụmụ akwụkwọ na-amụta concept ọ bụla site n'ịgafe ụzọ atọ nke representation. Anyị na-eduga gị n'otu nsogbu AHỤ n'ụzọ atọ niile ka abstract symbol nwee ntọala n'ihe ị ga-AHỤ ma METỤ AKA.
igbo.challenge_hub_quick_practice_across_ev: Ebe Ịma Aka — omume ngwa ngwa n'ofe manipulative ọ bụla
igbo.random_problems_spanning_all_12_manipu: Nsogbu random gbasara manipulatives 12 niile. E mere ya maka distributed practice (Cepeda et al. 2006): usoro mkpirisi nke nkeji ise, na-agwakọta ụdị, na-emeri nkeji iri abụọ nke otu ụdị n'usoro.
igbo.glossary_math_vocabulary_with_examples: Nkọwa Okwu — okwu mgbakọ, tinyere ihe atụ
igbo.vocabulary_is_the_curriculum_a_student: Okwu BỤ curriculum. Nwa akwụkwọ nụrụ "regroup," "compose," "decompose," "fluently," na "place value" ọtụtụ ugboro n'ọnọdụ ga-etinye usoro ahụ n'ime ya. E kegidere nkọwa ọ bụla na manipulative nke na-egosi ya.
igbo.brain_teasers_classic_math_puzzles: Gwam Gwam Gwam — puzzles ọdịnala nke mgbakọ
igbo.classic_problems_that_are_solvable_sat: Nsogbu ọdịnala nwere ngwọta, na-eju afọ, ma na-adịkarị mfe mgbe manipulative dị n'aka. Ha bara uru dị ka warm-up, ọrụ mejupụta oge, ma ọ bụ ọrụ nkwụsi ike maka mkparịta ụka klas.
igbo.history_math_tools_through_time: Akụkọ Ihe Mere Eme — ngwaọrụ mgbakọ n'ime oge
igbo.counting_bones_lebombo_35_000_bce_sume: Ọkpụkpụ ọgụgụ (Lebombo, ~35,000 BCE) → tokens ndị Sumer → abacus ndị Rom → Cuisenaire rods (1952) → taa. Manipulative ọ bụla na ngwaọrụ a bụ akụkụ nke ogologo agbụrụ nke ngwá nkuzi.
igbo.curriculum_map_which_tool_which_grade: Maapụ Curriculum — ngwaọrụ ole, grade ole
igbo.a_k_5_progression_chart_showing_which_: Chart usoro K-5 na-egosi manipulatives a na-eweta na grade ole na standards ndị ha na-akwado. Pịa cell ọ bụla iji mepee ngwaọrụ ahụ.
igbo.activity_cards_printable_lessons: Kaadị Ọrụ — ihe ọmụmụ enwere ike ibipụta
igbo.ready_to_print_activity_cards_for_smal: Kaadị ọrụ dị njikere ibipụta maka obere otu ma ọ bụ klas dum. Kaadị ọ bụla na-akpọ ebumnuche, ngwaọrụ, nzọụkwụ, na ajụjụ mgbasawanye. E mere ha ka e jiri ha mee ihe NA-EJIGHỊ app a — ma ị nwekwara ike ịgafe ha n'ime app.
igbo.quick_reference_answers_to_common_stud: Azịza ngwa ngwa maka ajụjụ ụmụ akwụkwọ na ndị nkuzi na-ajụkarị, tinyere keyboard shortcuts, ozi accessibility, na otú e si akpọtụrụ nkwado AlloFlow.
igbo.common_core_state_standards_for_mathem: Common Core State Standards for Mathematics, K–5. Chọgharịa site na grade, hụ manipulative na-edozi standard ọ bụla, ma wụga ozugbo na ya.
igbo.every_manipulative_s_current_state_can: Enwere ike ịkpọ ọnọdụ ugbu a nke manipulative ọ bụla aha, chekwaa ya, ma mepee ya ma emesịa. Ọ bara uru maka ịhazi ihe atụ klas tupu oge eruo, ma ọ bụ ka ụmụ akwụkwọ laghachi n'ọrụ na-aga n'ihu.

igbo.white_1_red_2_light_green_3_purple_4_y: Ọcha=1, Uhie=2, Akwụkwọ ndụ dị mfe=3, Odo odo=4, Odo=5, Akwụkwọ ndụ gbara ọchịchịrị=6, Oji=7, Aja aja=8, Anụnụ=9, Oroma=10.

igbo.egyptians_used_distinct_symbols_for_1_: Ndị Ijipt jiri symbols dị iche iche maka 1, 10, 100, 1000 — nke mgbakọ, base-10. ("Nkata" maka 1, ọkpụkpụ ikiri ụkwụ maka 10, mgbagharị maka 100, lotus maka 1000.)
igbo.the_oldest_surviving_counting_board_a_: Bọọdụ ọgụgụ kacha ochie fọdụrụ: mbadamba marble nwere ahịrị ndị hà nhata, ebe a na-akpụga okwute ("calculi" na Latin — mmalite nke "calculate") iji gbakọọ nchikota.
igbo.the_chinese_abacus_2_heaven_beads_5_ea: Abacus Chaịna: heaven beads 2 + earth beads 5 na rod ọ bụla. Ọ na-enye ohere base-16 (maka ịdị arọ ọdịnala Chaịna) yana base-10. A ka na-eji ya n'ụlọ ahịa taa.
igbo.brahmi_script_gives_us_0_9_and_place_v: Ederede Brahmi nyere anyị 0–9 na place-value notation. Otu ihe ọhụrụ kacha mkpa n'ọgụgụ ọnụọgụgụ.
igbo.persian_mathematician_writes_kit_b_al_: Ọkà mgbakọ Peshia dere "Kitāb al-mukhtaṣar fī ḥisāb al-jabr wal-muqābala." Okwu "algorithm" si n'aha ya; "algebra" si n'isiokwu ahụ.
igbo.leonardo_of_pisa_s_book_introduces_the: Akwụkwọ Leonardo nke Pisa wetara ọnụọgụgụ Hindu-Arabic na Europe nke oge ochie. Ọ gụnyere nsogbu "ọnụọgụ oke bekee" ama ama.
igbo.10_beads_per_rod_no_divider_used_in_ru: Beads 10 na rod ọ bụla, enweghị nkewa. E ji ya n'ụlọ ahịa Rọshịa ruo mgbe cash registers dochiri ha na 1990s.
igbo.john_napier_publishes_the_first_table_: John Napier bipụtara tebụl mbụ nke logarithms. Ọ na-eme ka ịba ụba bụrụ mgbakọ.
igbo.william_oughtred_slides_two_log_scales: William Oughtred na-amịfe log scales abụọ n'akụkụ ibe ha. Slide rule ghọrọ calculator maka afọ 350 na-esote.
igbo.famously_sums_1_through_100_in_seconds: Ọ na-achịkọta 1 ruo 100 na sekọnd ole na ole site n'ịkepụta 1+100, 2+99, ..., 50+51 — ụzọ iri ise nke 101 = 5050. Akụkọ ahụ nwere ike ọ bụghị eziokwu mana usoro ahụ bụ ezigbo.
igbo.the_italian_physician_will_go_on_to_de: Dọkịta Ịtali a ga-aga n'ihu ịhazi usoro base-10 nke "Golden Beads," nke bụ nna ochie kpọmkwem nke usoro base-10 blocks ọgbara ọhụrụ ọ bụla.
igbo.european_primary_classrooms_begin_usin: Klas praịmarị Europe malitere iji tiles geometry osisi maka ọrụ tessellation. Pattern blocks dị ka e hazichara ha taa bịara mgbe e mesịrị (1960s, curriculum ESS).
igbo.belgian_teacher_georges_cuisenaire_sho: Onye nkuzi Belgium Georges Cuisenaire gosiri Caleb Gattegno rods ya nwere agba. Gattegno gbasaa ha n'ụwa niile.
igbo.gattegno_also_popularizes_the_geoboard: Gattegno gbasakwara geoboard: grid nke pegs maka ịgbatị rubber bands ka ọ bụrụ polygons. Ọ na-eweta discrete geometry n'aka ụmụaka ndị dị obere.
igbo.toward_a_theory_of_instruction_bruner_: "Toward a Theory of Instruction." Bruner na-arụ ụka maka usoro enactive → iconic → symbolic — ihe klas United States na-akpọ Concrete-Representational-Abstract.
igbo.hewlett_packard_releases_the_first_han: Hewlett-Packard wepụtara calculator sayensị mbụ nke aka. Ire slide rule dara n'ime afọ 5.
igbo.singapore_s_ministry_of_education_adop: Ministri Agụmakwụkwọ Singapore nabatara curriculum gbadoro ụkwụ na model "Number Bond" na CRA progression. Singapore biliri n'elu ọkwa mba ụwa n'ime afọ iri abụọ.
igbo.u_s_ccss_m_adopted_in_most_states_expl: A nabatara CCSS-M nke US n'ọtụtụ steeti. Ọ na-akpọ n'ụzọ doro anya "concrete models" na "manipulatives" maka K-5 — na-adọta usoro Montessori, Cuisenaire, na Singapore n'ime standards mba.
igbo.web_based_tools_like_this_one_let_stud: Ngwaọrụ weebụ dị ka nke a na-enye ụmụ akwụkwọ ohere iji manipulatives ọdịnala mee ihe ebe ọ bụla. Nkuzi ahụ bụ otu; naanị ụzọ agbanweela.
igbo.the_sumerians_use_a_base_60_system_sex: Ndị Sumer jiri usoro base-60 (sexagesimal) — a ka na-ahụ ya na nkeji sekọnd 60 anyị na okirikiri digrii 360. Base-60 nwere ọtụtụ divisors, nke mara mma na mgbakọ.
igbo.approximates_by_inscribing_polygons_in: Ọ na-eme atụmatụ π site n'idenye polygons n'ime okirikiri na iji polygons gbaa ya gburugburu. Ọ na-akpachi π n'etiti 3 10/71 na 3 1/7.
igbo.al_khw_rizm_s_algebra_is_geometric_he_: Algebra nke Al-Khwārizmī bụ nke geometry — ọ na-emecha squares N'EZIE site n'ise rectangles. Algebra nke manipulative dị ochie karịa algebra nke symbols.
igbo.fibonacci_s_book_includes_a_problem_ab: Akwụkwọ Fibonacci gụnyere nsogbu gbasara ọmụmụ oke bekee nke na-emepụta Fibonacci sequence: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13... Otu ọnụọgụgụ ndị a na-apụta n'okike na na tilings pattern-block.
igbo.in_addition_to_inventing_the_slide_rul: Na mgbakwunye na ịchepụta slide rule, Oughtred wetara symbol × maka ịba ụba. (Leibniz kpọrọ ya asị: o chere na × yiri variable x nke ukwuu.)
igbo.leonhard_euler_will_give_us_e_i_for_1_: Leonhard Euler ga-enye anyị e, i maka √(−1), function-notation f(x), na Euler formula. Geoboards na-egosi formula ya nke "V − E + F = 2" maka polyhedra.
igbo.building_on_fr_bel_s_19th_century_kind: Na-ewuli n'elu "onyinye" kindergarten Fröbel nke narị afọ nke 19 (manipulatives osisi), Edith Somervell bipụtara A Rhythmic Approach to Mathematics — curriculum mbụ jupụtara na manipulative.
igbo.georges_cuisenaire_a_belgian_school_pr: Georges Cuisenaire, onyeisi ụlọ akwụkwọ Belgium, ejirila rods nwere agba mee ihe n'ọtụtụ afọ 4 na nzuzo. Nleta nke onye nyocha butere mbipụta; nnabata na-aga nwayọ ruo 1950s.
igbo.gattegno_tours_uk_schools_demonstratin: Gattegno gara njem n'ụlọ akwụkwọ UK na-egosi Cuisenaire rods. Nnabata gbawara. Ka ọ na-erule 1960s rods ndị ahụ dị na klas n'ofe Europe na Commonwealth.
igbo.the_national_council_of_teachers_of_ma: National Council of Teachers of Mathematics wepụtara ntuziaka na-akwado manipulatives na grades niile. Mgbanwe site na mmesi ike procedure ruo nke concept malitere n'ezie na klas US.
igbo.the_seminal_nctm_document_that_anchore: Akwụkwọ NCTM dị mkpa nke kwadoro "reform math." Ọ na-akpọ idozi nsogbu, ntụle, nkwurịta okwu, na njikọ dị ka isi. Manipulatives ghọrọ ngwaọrụ nkịtị.
igbo.updated_standards_add_a_representation: Standards e melitere tinyere Representation strand: ụmụ akwụkwọ kwesịrị inwe ike ịtụgharị n'etiti representations anụ ahụ, foto, symbol, na ọnọdụ — ya bụ, CRA loop.
igbo.ccss_m_explicitly_names_number_lines_t: CCSS-M na-akpọ n'ụzọ doro anya number lines, ten frames, base-10 blocks, na area models. Mathematical practices (MP1-MP8) na-ehazi OTÚ ụmụ akwụkwọ kwesịrị isi jikọọ na manipulatives.
igbo.mathematics_is_older_than_writing_ever: 💡 Mgbakọ dị ochie karịa ederede. Manipulative ọ bụla na ngwaọrụ a bụ nwa nke ihe ochie.
igbo.showing_students_the_lineage_this_is_t: Igosi ụmụ akwụkwọ agbụrụ ahụ — "nke a bụ otu echiche ahụ nna nna nna nna unu jiri mee ihe" — na-eme ka mgbakọ bụrụ ihe mmadụ mepụtara, ọ bụghị ihe omimi a ga-eburu n'isi.
igbo.suggested_first_month_sequence_any_gra: Usoro a tụrụ aro maka ọnwa mbụ (grade ọ bụla):
igbo.start_with_the_manipulative_most_centr: Malite na manipulative kacha dị mkpa maka standards ugbu a.
igbo.spend_2_3_sessions_on_free_exploration: Were nnọkọ 2–3 maka nnyocha nnwere onwe tupu "ịma aka" ọ bụla.
igbo.use_the_glossary_to_introduce_1_2_voca: Jiri Nkọwa Okwu weta okwu 1–2 na nnọkọ ọ bụla.
igbo.build_into_cra_progression_mode_once_a: Wuo ruo na mode CRA Progression ozugbo concept dịrị fluent.
igbo.save_anchor_examples_to_the_library_re: Chekwaa ihe atụ anchor na Ọbá Akwụkwọ; laghachi na ha kwa izu.
igbo.use_the_challenge_hub_for_5_min_warm_u: Jiri Ebe Ịma Aka maka warm-up nkeji 5 (interleaved practice).
igbo.across_grades_as_students_internalize_: n'ofe grades ka ụmụ akwụkwọ na-etinye representations n'ime ha.
igbo.a_6th_grader_who_needs_blocks_for_23_4: Nwa akwụkwọ grade 6 nke chọrọ blocks maka 23+47 abụghị blocks dara ya — e wepụghị ha n'oge zuru.
igbo.find_all_ways_to_make_10_with_two_part: Chọta ụzọ niile isi mee 10 na parts abụọ.
igbo.discover_regrouping_carrying_by_runnin: Chọpụta regrouping (carrying) site n'ọgwụgwụ nke otu.
igbo.model_integer_addition_with_positive_n: Mee model nke mgbakọ integer site na counters positive/negative.
igbo.use_the_hexagon_as_the_unit_whole_buil: Jiri hexagon dị ka unit whole; wuo ọdịdị ndị ọzọ dị ka fractions ya.
igbo.discover_that_area_and_perimeter_are_i: Chọpụta na area na perimeter adabereghị na ibe ha.
igbo.find_all_primes_1_100_using_the_sieve_: Chọta primes niile 1-100 site na iji Sieve of Eratosthenes.
igbo.fluently_decompose_any_number_from_5_t: Kewaa ọnụọgụgụ ọ bụla site na 5 ruo 10 nke ọma.
igbo.build_mental_imagery_of_place_value_vi: Wuo foto n'isi nke place value site na abacus.
igbo.connect_the_standard_addition_algorith: Jikọọ standard addition algorithm na regrouping anụ ahụ.
igbo.use_counters_as_a_thermometer_model: Jiri counters dị ka model thermometer.
igbo.find_all_trains_of_a_given_total: Chọta "trains" niile nke mkpokọta e nyere.
igbo.sort_quadrilaterals_by_their_propertie: Hazie quadrilaterals site na àgwà ha.
igbo.compare_two_fractions_using_the_same_w: Tụnyere fractions abụọ site n'iji otu whole ahụ.
igbo.dot_talks_multiple_ways_to_see_the_sam: Dot Talks — ụzọ dị iche iche isi hụ otu nhazi ahụ.
igbo.compare_3_digit_numbers_using_place_va: Tụnyere ọnụọgụgụ digits 3 site n'iji place-value blocks.
igbo.find_equivalent_ratios_with_rods: Chọta equivalent ratios site na rods.
igbo.solve_missing_addend_subtraction_with_: Dozie missing-addend subtraction site na number bond.
igbo.use_the_double_ten_frame_to_add_within: Jiri double ten frame tinye n'ime 20.
igbo.connect_one_bead_to_one_count: Jikọọ otu bead na otu ọgụgụ.
igbo.pick_the_right_tool_for_the_goal: Họrọ ngwaọrụ ziri ezi maka ebumnuche ahụ.
igbo.estimate_before_computing_3_digit_sums: Mee atụmatụ tupu ịgbakọ nchikota digits 3.
igbo.apply_cra_to_a_real_word_problem: Tinye CRA na ezigbo word problem.
igbo.five_minute_warm_up_across_all_manipul: Warm-up nkeji ise n'ofe manipulatives niile.
igbo.cards_are_designed_to_be_printed_and_u: 💡 E mere kaadị ka e bipụta ha ma jiri ha mee ihe pụọ na ihuenyo. Ezigbo manipulatives anụ ahụ ka na-emeri ndị virtual maka K-2 — kinesthetic loop dị mkpa.
igbo.the_app_gives_you_every_manipulative_o: App na-enye gị MANIPULATIVE ỌBỤLA n'aka, ọbụlagodi mgbe kit anụ ahụ anọghị n'ime ụlọ.
igbo.treating_manipulatives_as_filler_not_i: Iwere manipulatives dị ka "mejupụta oge" ọ bụghị nkuzi
igbo.common_mistake_handing_out_blocks_and_: Ndudue a na-emekarị: ikesa blocks wee pụọ. Na-enweghị nkuzi doro anya na-EJIKỌ manipulative na symbol, ụmụ akwụkwọ na-egwurikarị egwuregwu ahụ ma ghara ịmụta ihe ọhụrụ. Mechie nnọkọ manipulative ọ bụla mgbe niile na: "Gosi m n'akwụkwọ ihe ị mere."
igbo.keeping_students_on_the_concrete_stage: Ịhapụ ụmụ akwụkwọ na nzọụkwụ concrete ogologo oge
igbo.a_4th_grader_who_still_needs_blocks_fo: Nwa akwụkwọ grade 4 nke ka CHỌRỌ blocks maka 23 + 47 nwere nsogbu. Blocks bụ scaffold; ọ bụrụ na a wepụghị ha, fluency adịghị eto. Gaa na representational (foto) ruo grade 2-3, ruo abstract (symbols) ruo grade 3-4. Laghachi na concrete naanị maka concepts ọhụrụ.
igbo.most_rushed_teachers_go_from_blocks_st: Ọtụtụ ndị nkuzi na-eme ngwa ngwa na-esi na blocks gaa ozugbo na "ugbu a dee 4 + 5 = 9." Nke ahụ na-awụfe nzọụkwụ iconic (ise dots, number lines, arrays). Witzel, Mercer & Miller (2003) chọpụtara na oghere ahụ bụ ebe ọtụtụ ndị na-amụ ihe na-ada. Tinye nzọụkwụ foto mgbe niile.
igbo.letting_students_always_work_alone: Ịhapụ ụmụ akwụkwọ ka ha na-arụ ọrụ naanị ha mgbe niile
igbo.manipulative_work_without_talk_is_half: Ọrụ manipulative na-enweghị OKWU bụ ọkara uru ya. Kepụta ụmụ akwụkwọ abụọ abụọ; chọọ ka ha kwuo ihe ha na-eme n'ọnụ. Ikwu ya n'ọnụ BỤ nzọụkwụ nkwado nke na-akpụga omume site na "mkpịsị aka maara" ruo "isi maara."
igbo.timed_fact_fluency_drills_can_make_stu: Drills fact-fluency nwere oge nwere ike ime ka ụmụ akwụkwọ dịkwuo ọsọ na procedures ha na-aghọtaghị (lee nnyocha "math anxiety": Boaler 2014). Ọrụ manipulative nwayọ ADỊGHỊ ala karịa ọrụ akwụkwọ ọsọ maka K-3.
igbo.don_t_use_the_abacus_to_teach_fraction: Ejila abacus kuzie fractions. Ejila pattern blocks kuzie place value. Maapụ Curriculum na-egosi manipulative na-edozi CCSS ole — malite ebe ahụ.
igbo.praising_effort_but_not_strategy: Ito mgbalị mana ọ bụghị strategy
igbo.saying_great_job_rewards_completion_sa: Ikwu "ọrụ ọma!" na-akwụ ụgwọ maka imecha. Ikwu "Ahụrụ m na ị nwaara trapezoids 3 tupu ị gbanwee gaa na triangles 6 — gịnị mere ka ị gbanwee?" na-akwụ ụgwọ maka echiche. Kwuo kpọmkwem.
igbo.ignoring_student_invented_strategies: Ileghara strategies ụmụ akwụkwọ chepụtara anya
igbo.a_student_who_shows_8_5_as_9_4_because: Nwa akwụkwọ na-egosi 8 + 5 dị ka "9 + 4" (n'ihi na o were 1 site na 5 tinye ya na 8 na mbụ) echepụtala strategy make-ten. Kpughee ya; kpọọ ya aha; kuziere klas ka ha nwaa ya. Ụzọ akwụkwọ abụghị naanị ụzọ ziri ezi.
igbo.a_table_covered_in_4_different_manipul: Tebụl jupụtara na manipulatives 4 dị iche iche bụ ntọala nke mgbagwoju anya, ọ bụghị differentiation. Họrọ OTU maka ihe ọmụmụ ọ bụla. Ndị ọzọ 11 na ngwaọrụ a dị mma — maka ihe ọmụmụ ndị ọzọ.
igbo.students_will_arrange_counters_correct: Ụmụ akwụkwọ ga-ahazi counters n'ụzọ ziri ezi n'ihi na ha eburula nzọụkwụ ahụ n'isi, na-aghọtaghị ihe ọ pụtara. "Gịnị mere i ji tinye 1 na column nke iri?" kwesịrị ịbụ ajụjụ gị kacha ajụ.
igbo.a_built_construction_is_a_powerful_art: Ihe owuwu e wuru bụ ihe dị ike — hapụ ya na tebụl ka klas na-ekwu maka ya. Chekwaa ya na Ọbá Akwụkwọ ma ọ bụrụ na ị chọrọ ya echi. Emela ka ụmụ akwụkwọ kwatuo ihe owuwu ha ji ike wuo iji "dị njikere maka isiokwu na-esote."
igbo.what_is_4_3_has_one_answer_convergent_: "Gịnị bụ 4 + 3?" nwere otu azịza (convergent). "Gosi m 7 n'ụzọ atọ dị iche" nwere ọtụtụ (divergent). Prompts divergent na-ekpughe otú ụmụ akwụkwọ si eche echiche — nke bụ assessment dị mkpa.
igbo.a_virtual_kit_of_12_classic_k_5_math_m: Kit virtual nke manipulatives mgbakọ ọdịnala 12 nke K-5, tinyere scaffold CRA progression,
igbo.a_challenge_bank_a_ccss_standards_brow: ụlọ akụ ịma aka, CCSS standards browser, ọbá akwụkwọ kaadị ọrụ enwere ike ibipụta, na
igbo.a_teacher_dashboard_with_progress_expo: dashboard onye nkuzi nwere mbupụ ọganihu.
igbo.built_as_part_of: E wuru ya dị ka akụkụ nke
igbo.an_open_source_learning_platform_for_k: , ikpo okwu mmụta open-source maka klas K-12.
igbo.alloflow_is_licensed_under_agpl_v3: AlloFlow nwere ikike n'okpuru AGPL v3.
igbo.manipulatives_montessori_golden_beads_: Manipulatives: Montessori (Golden Beads), Cuisenaire (1952), Gattegno (Geoboard), Singapore Math (Number Bonds).
igbo.standards_common_core_state_standards_: Standards: Common Core State Standards for Mathematics, K-7.
igbo.accessibility_wcag_2_1_aa_okabe_ito_cb: Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA. Palette Okabe-Ito dị mma maka ìsì agba.
igbo.audio_web_audio_api_for_sound_effects_: Audio: Web Audio API maka sound effects, enwere ike ịgbanyụ ya kpamkpam.
igbo.all_state_lives_in_your_browser_no_dat: Ọnọdụ niile na-ebi na browser gị. A naghị eziga data ebe ọ bụla ma ọ bụrụ na ị bupụghị ya n'onwe gị.
igbo.browser_storage_is_per_device_clearing: Nchekwa browser bụ nke ngwaọrụ ọ bụla — ihichapụ data saịtị na-atọghata ọganihu.
igbo.fraction_bars_make_equivalence_visible: 💡 Fraction bars na-eme ka equivalence PỤTA ÌHÈ: gosi 1/2 nke bar halves na 3/6 nke bar sixths — ha na-ekpuchi otu ogologo ahụ. Otu fraction ahụ.
igbo.algebra_tiles_make_abstract_algebra_ph: 💡 Algebra tiles na-eme ka abstract algebra bụrụ nke anụ ahụ. Tile positive na negative nke otu ọdịdị na-eme "zero pair." Tiles nwere agba zuru oke bụ positive; tiles ọcha nwere ọnụ dashed bụ negative. Jiri ndị a mee model nke expressions, mee ka ha dị mfe, na (maka ụmụ akwụkwọ tọrọ eto) factor quadratics site n'ịhazi tiles ka ọ bụrụ rectangles.
igbo.select_a_tool_above_to_get_started: Họrọ ngwaọrụ dị n'elu iji malite.
